metadata.description: Existing Cosmos DB account resource ID (optional)
Subscription ID where existing private DNS zones are located. Leave empty for current subscription.
DNS zone map: zone name -> resource group. Empty value means create zone in current resource group.
Enable Azure Firewall + UDR controlled egress
Deploy project capability host and post-capability-host role assignments
Existing VNet resource ID (optional). If set, existing VNet path is used.
Foundry account name (must be globally unique)
Existing Cosmos DB account resource ID (optional)
Subscription ID where existing private DNS zones are located. Leave empty for current subscription.
DNS zone map: zone name -> resource group. Empty value means create zone in current resource group.
Enable Azure Firewall + UDR controlled egress
Deploy project capability host and post-capability-host role assignments

parameters.storageAccountName: [if(reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('validate-existing-{0}', variables('shortSuffix'))), '2025-04-01').outputs.azureStorageExists.value, createObject('value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('validate-existing-{0}', variables('shortSuffix'))), '2025-04-01').outputs.azureStorageName.value), createObject('value', parameters('storageAccountName')))]
parameters.searchServiceName: [if(reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('validate-existing-{0}', variables('shortSuffix'))), '2025-04-01').outputs.aiSearchExists.value, createObject('value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('validate-existing-{0}', variables('shortSuffix'))), '2025-04-01').outputs.aiSearchName.value), createObject('value', parameters('searchServiceName')))]
parameters.cosmosAccountName: [if(reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('validate-existing-{0}', variables('shortSuffix'))), '2025-04-01').outputs.cosmosDBExists.value, createObject('value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('validate-existing-{0}', variables('shortSuffix'))), '2025-04-01').outputs.cosmosDBName.value), createObject('value', parameters('cosmosAccountName')))]

metadata.description: Object mapping DNS zone names to resource group names. Empty value means create zone in current resource group.
Subscription ID for existing DNS zones. Empty means current subscription.

id.value: [resourceId('Microsoft.Network/privateDnsZones/virtualNetworkLinks', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('zoneName'), parameters('linkName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('zoneName'), parameters('linkName')), '/')[1])]

[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/privateDnsZones/virtualNetworkLinks', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('zoneName'), parameters('linkName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('zoneName'), parameters('linkName')), '/')[1])]

[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/privateDnsZones/virtualNetworkLinks', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('zoneName'), parameters('linkName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('zoneName'), parameters('linkName')), '/')[1])]

[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/privateDnsZones/virtualNetworkLinks', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('zoneName'), parameters('linkName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('zoneName'), parameters('linkName')), '/')[1])]

[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/privateDnsZones/virtualNetworkLinks', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('zoneName'), parameters('linkName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('zoneName'), parameters('linkName')), '/')[1])]

[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/privateDnsZones/virtualNetworkLinks', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('zoneName'), parameters('linkName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('zoneName'), parameters('linkName')), '/')[1])]

metadata.description: Public IP name for Azure Firewall
Enable minimal outbound egress rules for management subnet traffic
CIDR prefixes for subnets that should egress through firewall
Target subnet name for route table association

properties.addressPrefix: [reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName')), '/')[1]), '2024-05-01').addressPrefix]
properties.delegations: [reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName')), '/')[1]), '2024-05-01').delegations]
properties.privateEndpointNetworkPolicies: [reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName')), '/')[1]), '2024-05-01').privateEndpointNetworkPolicies]
